hero_title: See what coding models actually build.
hero_tagline: Real coding-agent & model benchmarks with live demos — scored by editors and by you
play_hint: These demos are interactive. Click inside a preview to play, or open it in a new tab for the full experience.
benchmarks_description: Compare live artifacts from coding models and agent tools under the same prompt.
leaderboard_description: Compare coding models across editor scores and community ratings.
apps_agents_description: Compare the coding apps and agent harnesses used to produce benchmark results.
name: Name
about_intro: MoobangBench publishes the actual artifacts produced by AI coding models and agent tools, not just pass/fail claims.
methodology_body: Each editor score averages four 10-point criteria: functionality, code quality, polish, and performance. Community scores are anonymous visitor ratings from 1 to 10.
privacy_intro: MoobangBench collects only the information needed to operate community voting and site analytics or advertising when enabled.
privacy_votes_body: To limit duplicate voting, the server creates a one-way SHA-256 hash from the visitor IP address, browser user-agent, and a private salt. Raw IP addresses and user-agent strings are not stored in the vote database.
privacy_storage_body: The site stores language preference and the visitor's previously selected vote in browser local storage. You can remove this data through your browser settings.
privacy_ads_body: When Google AdSense is enabled, Google and its partners may use cookies or similar technologies to serve and measure ads. Google provides controls for personalized advertising and consent where legally required.
privacy_contact_body: Privacy questions can be submitted through the MoobangBench GitHub issue tracker.
